response.global_analysis: 1. Audio-Visual Alignment: Intro and main performance synced with native pronunciation and official metadata. 2. Pacing: Adjusted timings to capture rapid lyrics, minimizing cascading delay. 3. Ending Segment: Subtitled the final post-performance interactions.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: Surely the path ahead is deep and unstable

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃ つまんないね
subtitles.english: But being well-behaved is just boring

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: Hop into the time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: If only I could become a traveler

subtitles.original: Done
subtitles.english: Done

subtitles.original: [Forever Young]
subtitles.english: [Forever Young]

subtitles.original: シボレーのドアを蹴り開けて街に飛び出した俺んた
subtitles.english: Kicking open the door of the Chevy and heading out into the streets

subtitles.original: 暴力 酒に女 音楽 中指立てる大人の仮面にゃ
subtitles.english: Violence, booze, women, music; flipping off the masks of adults

subtitles.original: さぁ踊ろう 「今日」という日を生き急ぐメンバー
subtitles.english: Let's dance, members rushing through this day called 'today'

subtitles.original: 足りねぇか？ Little louder! 欲望渦巻く路上が現場
subtitles.english: Not enough? Little louder! The swirling street of desire is our stage

subtitles.original: いつだってそうだろ？ ブルハ 尾崎 永ちゃんが教科書
subtitles.english: It's always been like that, right? Blue Hearts, Ozaki, Echan are our textbooks

subtitles.original: くたばるまで格好つけてぇ 誓ったよあの放課後
subtitles.english: We swore to look cool until we drop, back then after school

subtitles.original: 俺らピーターパン 「またいつか」なんて言っちゃいかん<
subtitles.english: We're Peter Pan, we shouldn't say 'maybe some other time'

subtitles.original: 嘲笑っとる大人に言ってやらぁ 人生はたったの一回だ
subtitles.english: Tell those mocking adults, life only happens once!

subtitles.original: 胸の奥底 初期衝動
subtitles.english: Deep in our chest, the primal urge

subtitles.original: 見て見ぬフリ No, No
subtitles.english: Turning a blind eye, no, no

subtitles.original: 夢追い笑われ 傷だらけでギラつく My way
subtitles.english: Chasing dreams, being laughed at, glittering on my way full of scars

subtitles.original: Go on! You should know who we are Forever Young
subtitles.english: Go on! You should know who we are, Forever Young

subtitles.original: Hey! Just next to me from now 大切なことは魂の状態
subtitles.english: Hey! Just next to me from now, the important thing is the state of your soul

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young

subtitles.original: Hey! It's your turn next time from here 「あの日始めれば良かった」
subtitles.english: Hey! It's your turn next time from here, 'I wish I had started that day'

subtitles.original: その次の始めるべき時は今
subtitles.english: The next best time to start is now

subtitles.original: 高笑いする都会の喧騒 ウケ狙いならば振り向けれんぞ
subtitles.english: The roaring din of the city, we won't look back for cheap laughs

subtitles.original: 何連呼？忘れろ？夢流した便所見下ろしてきやがる摩天楼
subtitles.english: How many calls? Forget it? The skyscrapers looking down on the toilet where dreams were flushed

subtitles.original: Oh まるで勝新みたく破天荒 伝説へとアテンド
subtitles.english: Daring like Shintaro Katsu, attending to the legend

subtitles.original: 怖にゃあ怖にゃあてその程度
subtitles.english: If you're scared, it's only to that extent

subtitles.original: 捨てろ負け惜しみ 過去の栄光
subtitles.english: Throw away your sour grapes and past glory

subtitles.original: 永遠なんぞはねぇて いつか天へ召され ペンで
subtitles.english: There's no such thing as eternity, we'll be summoned to heaven someday

subtitles.original: 書き殴ったこの魂は2PACみたく誰かの心を通過
subtitles.english: This soul scribbled down will pass through someone's heart like 2Pac

subtitles.original: なぁ何か忘れちゃねぇか 人生まるで映画 皆がエンターテイナー
subtitles.english: Hey, didn't you forget something? Life is like a movie, everyone is an entertainer

subtitles.original: 思い出せ思想は現実化する 誰がHighway飛ばすBentayga
subtitles.english: Remember, thoughts become reality, who's speeding down the highway in a Bentayga?

subtitles.original: 胸の奥底 初期衝動
subtitles.english: Deep in our chest, the primal urge

subtitles.original: 見て見ぬフリ No, No
subtitles.english: Turning a blind eye, no, no

subtitles.original: 夢追い笑われ 傷だらけでギラつく My way
subtitles.english: Chasing dreams, being laughed at, glittering on my way full of scars

subtitles.original: Go on! You should know who we are Forever Young
subtitles.english: Go on! You should know who we are, Forever Young

subtitles.original: Hey! 俺達は今日だって 若気の至りのような夢を追いかけて来た
subtitles.english: Hey! Even today we've been chasing dreams like the rashness of youth

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young

subtitles.original: Hey! 変わるはずなんてない さぁ至ってやろうぜ!
subtitles.english: Hey! There's no way it'll change, so let's reach for it!

subtitles.original: 今日は残された人生で一番若い日だろ
subtitles.english: Today is the youngest day of the rest of your life

subtitles.original: 半端な覚悟ならドブに捨てな (永遠)
subtitles.english: If your determination is half-hearted, throw it in the ditch (Eternity)

subtitles.original: 往生際が悪いテメー笑い飛ばし誇れBetter days
subtitles.english: Laugh off your bad sportsmanship and take pride in better days

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない 終わらせやしない 燃え尽きるまで (永遠)
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, we won't let it end, until we burn out (Eternity)

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない 終わらせやしない くたばるまで (永遠)
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, we won't let it end, until we drop dead (Eternity)

subtitles.original: Forever Young もう夢を追いかけ 本気になった心は
subtitles.english: Forever Young, the heart that has chased dreams and got serious

subtitles.original: 自分の指図も受けない
subtitles.english: won't even take orders from itself

subtitles.original: Forever Young Hey! その思いから逃れられないなら
subtitles.english: Forever Young, hey! If you can't escape that feeling,

subtitles.original: 自ら向かうだけ
subtitles.english: just head toward it yourself

subtitles.original: 終わらせやしない 燃え尽きるまで (永遠)
subtitles.english: We won't let it end, until we burn out (Eternity)

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない 終わらせやしない くたばるまで (永遠)
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, we won't let it end, until we drop dead (Eternity)

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない まだ終わらない Forever Young (Forever Young)
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, it's not over yet, Forever Young (Forever Young)

subtitles.original: そう 今日という日は お前に残された人生の一番若い日
subtitles.english: That's right, today is the youngest day of the rest of your life

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: マリン、来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Marine, thank you for coming!

subtitles.original: 呼んでくれてありがとう！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you for inviting me! Yay!

subtitles.original: いや、マジこのForever Youngって曲をマリンと一緒に歌いたかったの、Forever Youngって曲をね。
subtitles.english: No, seriously, I really wanted to sing this song 'Forever Young' with Marine.

subtitles.original: あー、それはマリンがおばさんにならないように？
subtitles.english: Ah, so that Marine won't become an old lady?

subtitles.original: そう、もうForeverのYoungだって言うのを、言ってやるっていうね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, to tell you that you're Forever Young!

subtitles.original: そうだね、永遠にね。ヤング、うちらは。
subtitles.english: That's right, eternally. We are young.

subtitles.original: みんな、みんな、Forever Young。
subtitles.english: Everyone, everyone, Forever Young.
